zh.lifeSummary: Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl於大約1628年出生在德國沃爾可斯塔阿特 賀瑟可萊斯 艾爾巴賀賀倫巴賀。她於大約1653年與Hans Georg Steck在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯貝爾費爾登結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1679年1月26日在德國賀瑟奧登瓦爾德可萊斯賀瑟內可霍賀格享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: Uhl
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German and Czech: from a short form of the personal name   Ulrich  .
North German: nickname from Middle Low German ule ‘owl’ for someone who reminded in some way of the bird.
Czech: perhaps also a nickname or a metonymic occupational name from Czech uh(e)l ‘coal’.

variants.name: Ulrich
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Hans, Gerhard, Klaus, Frieda, Fritz, Reinhard, Alfons, Alois, Bernd.

German: from the personal name Ulrich, Old High German Odalrīc, composed of the elements odal ‘inherited property, fortune’ + rīc ‘power’. The name was borne by a 10th-century Christian saint, bishop of Augsburg, whose fame contributed greatly to the popularity of the personal name in German- and Slavic-speaking areas in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Uehlein
meanings: German (also Ühlein): from a pet form of the personal name Uhl .

variants.name: Uhls
meanings: Altered form of German Uhl , with the addition of excrescent -s, a common feature of Americanized surnames.

variants.name: Uhle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Alfons, Kurt.

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

nameMeanings.name: Ursula
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Ursula, a diminutive of ursa ‘(she-)bear’. This was the name of a 4th-century saint martyred at Cologne with a number of companions, traditionally said to have been eleven thousand, but more probably just eleven, the exaggeration being due to a misreading of a diacritic mark in an early manuscript. This name was moderately popular in the 16th century, but its use in the English-speaking world today is selective. A more recent influence has been the film actress Ursula Andress ( b. 1936 in Switzerland).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl was born about 1628, in Schöllenbach, Erbach, People's State of Hesse, Germany. She married Hans Georg Steck about 1653, in Beerfelden, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 26 January 1679, in Hohberg, Hesseneck, Odenwaldkreis, Hesse, Germany, at the age of 52.

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl(은)는 대략 1628년 독일 볼크스타앳 헤센 크레이스 르바치 슈o렌바치에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1653년 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 브이르펠든에서 Hans Georg Steck(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1679년 1월 26일 독일 헤센 오데월드크레이스 헤센c크 호h버그에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Anna Ursula Agnes Uhl родилась около 1628 г. в местности щoлленбач, крис эрбач, фолксстаат хессен, Германия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hans Georg Steck около 1653 г. в местности бирфелден, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 26 января 1679 г. в местности хохбирг, хессинекк, оденвалдкрис, Гессен, Германия в возрасте 52 лет.

th.Schöllenbach, Oberzent, Odenwaldkreis, H: ชoลลเอนบาช, กไรส ร์รบาช, ฟอลกสสตาาติ เฮเซน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.of Hohberg (Beerfelden), Erbach, Starken: เบรฟเอลเดน, กไรส ร์รบาช, ฟอลกสสตาาติ เฮเซน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Gammelsbach (Beerfelden), Erbach, Starke: ร์รบาช, สตารกเอนบอูรก, กโรssเฮรโซกตอูม เฮเซน

to.errechnet 28 September 1656: mei he 12 Sepitema 1656 ki he 14 ʻOkatopa 1656
to.Schöllenbach, Oberzent, Odenwaldkreis, H: Schöllenbach, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Siamane
to.of Hohberg (Beerfelden), Erbach, Starken: Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Siamane

uk.of Hohberg (Beerfelden), Erbach, Starken: бирфелден, крис эрбач, фолксстаат хессен, Німеччина

vi.errechnet 28 September 1656: từ ngày 12 tháng 9 năm 1656 đến ngày 14 tháng 10 năm 1656

vi.of Hohberg (Beerfelden), Erbach, Starken: Beerfelden, Kreis Erbach, Volksstaat Hessen, Đức
